results.content:
Customization

Report

 5 views

•1 review

使用后，”总是保持ELEMENTER最新版，并启用与复制相关的功能“，体验感不好，尤其是支付系统不完善，paypal和信用卡支付界面总是报错，不能进行支付操作!最失败最恼火的是，这个网站没有任何咨询服务途径，点击网页右下角的对话图标，竟然是无效的链接！这让用户如何使用？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？？ After use, the experience of "always keeping the latest version of ElementER and enabling copy related functions" is not good, especially with incomplete payment systems. The PayPal and credit card payment interfaces always report errors and cannot perform payment operations! The most frustrating and unsuccessful thing is that this website has no consulting service channels. Clicking on the conversation icon in the bottom right corner of the webpage turns out to be an invalid link! How can users use this????????????????????????

results.title: Delphi Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
I have had my Delphi clone since April of this year and I have to say that there was an effect that I found to be astounding and completely counter-intuitive. I speak, train, coach and consult on influence, persuasion, and communication. I trained my Delphi clone on my past talks, frameworks, notes, etc. The number of people who reach out to me thanking me for "my" advice has been amazing. What is astounding and counter-intuitive is that it has actually INCREASED the rapport we have when we meet in-person. You see, because of my Delphi clone, I have been serving them and they appreciate my service. When we meet in-person, they're full of gratitude and feel like they know me at a deeper level. I highly recommend it. I think of more and more uses each day - creating content, overcoming [...] 15 views

•1 review

It's awesome. I've had my own Delphi clone for about a year now, and as a company we send all our customer support requests that involve subject matter expertise to it. It's exchanged over 30,000 messages with our customers and followers, and we've heard back nothing but glowing reviews. It's essentially a new, much more effective and conversational search engine for the huge volume of content I create, plus adding an interactive layer on top of that content.

Report

 17 views

Conversational Replicas by Tavus

used Delphi to build Conversational Replicas by Tavus

•4 reviews [...] more and more uses each day - creating content, overcoming writer's block, personal coaching (yes, for myself - because the Delphi clone is not subject to all of the whirlwind my day has been, it can sometimes advise me in ways I would advise a friend). Love it.

Vignesh (Viggy) Ravichandran
MyClone

MyClone [...] Your clone works 24×7 directly on your Website, CRM, Email, Slack, etc. by answering support questions, handling prospect inquiries, and even assisting during workshops. While you focus on your clients and strategy, it handles the routine conversations that keep your business running. You can even create multiple personas to handle specific situations.  
  
Also, professionals can monetize their clones with advanced access control, integrations. They are using it for market research, conducting workshops, and for role-plays.

results.title: Your AI Clone: Your clone remembers people you've never met | Product Hunt
results.content:
Kimberly Ross

@shaunscdmx Hey Shaun. This reminds me of an episode from Black Mirror! Where do you get information about people I’ve never met? Public web, email headers, calendar invites, LinkedIn, contact lists, meeting transcripts, CRM imports? Which sources are opt-in vs automatically ingested?

Mahesh Yadav

@shaunscdmx Hi Shaun - that opening story is strong. The idea of your clone carrying conversations forward while you sleep is both powerful and a little surreal.

The memory layer is what makes this interesting, not just content responses but continuity.

I’m building Ahsk, a macOS AI assistant focused on seamless AI in daily workflows. Would love to connect
